content:textarea:3:34.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:3:34.html: If you are looking for other opportunities to give or volunteer this Christmas, you’ll find more options below. Each one is a chance to share blessings and let every act of kindness echo the love that God has for each of us. Let us come together to make this Christmas a season of miracles, transforming lives through service, compassion, and unwavering faith.

content:textarea:3:34.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:25:40-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:wysiwyg_basic:4:70.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:4:70.html: If you are interested in providing these volunteer services or donations, don't hesitate to contact Volunteer Coordinator. Joni Hunter, 336-245-2083.

content:textarea:7:49.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:7:49.html: Help us provide Thanksgiving and Christmas meals for up to 70 clients at the Center of Hope, the only homeless family shelter in our region. We are seeking sponsors to provide and serve meals on Thanksgiving, Christmas Eve, and Christmas Day. By offering warm food and fellowship, you give the gift of hope and compassion to families facing challenging times.
content:textarea:7:49.content: Help us provide Thanksgiving and Christmas meals for up to 70 clients at the Center of Hope, the only homeless family shelter in our region. We are seeking sponsors to provide and serve meals on Thanksgiving, Christmas Eve, and Christmas Day. By offering warm food and fellowship, you give the gift of hope and compassion to families facing challenging times.
content:textarea:7:49.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:25:40-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:8:16.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:8:16.html: Adopt Our Seniors – Sharing Joy with Our Cherished Elders
content:textarea:8:16.content: Adopt Our Seniors – Sharing Joy with Our Cherished Elders
content:textarea:8:16.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:25:40-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:9:23.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:9:23.html: We are looking for groups to adopt approximately 45 seniors from our Senior Program through our Angel Tree program. Your generosity will bring not just gifts but dignity, love, and joy to those who often feel forgotten.
content:textarea:9:23.content: We are looking for groups to adopt approximately 45 seniors from our Senior Program through our Angel Tree program. Your generosity will bring not just gifts but dignity, love, and joy to those who often feel forgotten.
content:textarea:9:23.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:25:40-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:10:0.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:10:0.html: Adopt Our Center of Hope Children – Bringing Christmas Toys and Joy to Families in Need
content:textarea:10:0.content: Adopt Our Center of Hope Children – Bringing Christmas Toys and Joy to Families in Need
content:textarea:10:0.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:25:40-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:11:2.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:11:2.html: This season, we seek a group or organization to provide toys for approximately 45 children living in our Center of Hope. By participating in the Angel Tree program, your group can fill their holiday with joy and laughter, delivering toys to their doors on Christmas Eve. Each gift you provide shares the message that hope and love endure, even in challenging times.
content:textarea:11:2.content: This season, we seek a group or organization to provide toys for approximately 45 children living in our Center of Hope. By participating in the Angel Tree program, your group can fill their holiday with joy and laughter, delivering toys to their doors on Christmas Eve. Each gift you provide shares the message that hope and love endure, even in challenging times.
content:textarea:11:2.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:25:40-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:12:74.name: Paragraph

content:textarea:12:74.content: Host a Toy Drive – Empower Hope, One Toy at a Time
content:textarea:12:74.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:25:40-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:13:5.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:13:5.html: Partner with us by hosting a toy drive for children in need this Christmas. We will provide boxes and help you with the logistics. Each donated toy is more than a gift; it symbolizes hope and a reminder that love knows no boundaries. Together, we are an Army commissioned by grace to uplift and inspire.

Each donated toy is more than a gift; it symbolizes hope and a reminder that love knows no boundaries. Together, we are an Army commissioned by grace to uplift and inspire.
content:textarea:13:5.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:25:40-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:15:82.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:15:82.html: We are seeking a sponsor to provide meals for 50 volunteers on two separate days during our warehouse distribution as part of the Angel Tree program. By sponsoring these lunches, you help us feed the bodies and spirits of volunteers tirelessly working to bring joy to children. This is your chance to give more than just food—it's an opportunity to be a blessing to others who serve.

content:wysiwyg_basic:17:91.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:17:91.html: Our Angel Tree program is an opportunity to adopt a child’s Christmas and give them a brighter Christmas. When you volunteer or donate, you become part of our mission of "Doing the Most Good." Visit wsangeltree.com to adopt a child and become an answered prayer for families in need.

content:wysiwyg_basic:20:60.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:20:60.html: Sign up to ring the bell this year and make a lasting difference. Every ring is a call to action, and every coin dropped is an act of love. Join us at registertoring.com and help us serve our community. Your time, your voice, and your presence all contribute to the fabric of kindness that makes our mission possible.
